object.name: I understand that you're playing my game

look.name: I understand that you're playing my game

object.name: Just don't think about what I'm planning...

look.name: Just don't think about what I'm planning...

object.name: But you're going to die. Die, die, die, die, die, die.

look.name: But you're going to die. Die, die, die, die, die, die.
